basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Tutor / Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Mangalagiri
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri) has published the Tutor / Demonstrator Notification 2026 on Not Mentioned. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Tutor / Demonstrator position. Candidates within the age range of Up to 37 years and holding MBBS or equivalent (with internship) / Postgraduate Master’s degree in relevant discipline are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application process will be active from Not Mentioned to 30-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 37 years Age Relaxation: OBC: +3 years; SC/ST: +5 years; PwBD: +10 years (General), +13 years (OBC), +15 years (SC/ST)

qualification.details: Medical Candidates: MBBS or equivalent medical qualification included in Schedule I/II or Part II of III Schedule of IMC Act 1956 + 1 year compulsory rotating internship. Non-Medical Candidates: Postgraduate Master's degree in the discipline/allied subject.

selection_process: Screening of applications and documents Written examination (MCQ based on subject if large number of applications) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Tutor / Demonstrator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Mangalagiri to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Tutor / Demonstrator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Tutor / Demonstrator posts at AIIMS Mangalagiri is 30th May 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Tutor / Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: For medical candidates, an MBBS degree with a 1-year compulsory internship is required. Non-medical candidates need a Postgraduate Master's degree in the relevant discipline or an allied subject.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Tutor / Demonstrator position is 37 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Tutor / Demonstrator post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Tutor / Demonstrator post, specifically in the Anatomy department, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Tutor / Demonstrator position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 56,100/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to the General and OBC categories is Rs. 1,500/-.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 1,000/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Tutor / Demonstrator role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves screening of applications, followed by a written examination (if applicable) and an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment for the Tutor / Demonstrator post at AIIMS Mangalagiri is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website of AIIMS Mangalagiri is also provided.
